name: My claim in Boise Idaho was denied for late reporting—can I fix it?

mainEntity.name: My claim in Boise Idaho was denied for late reporting—can I fix it?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Appeal if within deadlines, providing good cause for delay.** Idaho allows some extensions.[4] Key factors: Document reasons; strong evidence revives. File fast, get lawyer. Many denials overturned with help.
